history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A dark-themed game interface shows a “LEVEL UP!” screen with progress and experience bars, along with a circular avatar and several numeric counters.

The main subject is a full-width user interface panel displaying level and experience information, centered on the screen.

The setting is an on-screen graphic with a dark navy and purple background, featuring a large rounded rectangle panel. At the top, a yellow-gold heading reads “LEVEL UP!”; the panel contains a bold title and multiple progress indicators. Lighting appears as a flat, digital glow typical of a UI design.

The main panel shows the text “Jangan di chat nom…” in large white letters, with a small rounded badge near the top-right that reads “#136”. Below, a left circular avatar contains a colorful illustrated scene with characters and small details, outlined by a purple ring. To the right of the avatar are two rounded rectangles: one purple box labeled “LEVEL” with the number “2” beneath it, and one teal box labeled “EXPERIENCE” with “4 / 150” beneath it. Under these, a horizontal progress bar is partially filled, and to the right of it the text “2%” appears. Near the bottom of the panel are three darker rounded boxes labeled “MESSAGES” with “16”, “XP NEEDED” with “146”, and “NEXT LVL” with “3”. At the bottom center, faint small text reads “Congratulations on leveling up!”.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
Jangan di chat nom…
#136
LEVEL
2
EXPERIENCE
4 / 150
2%
MESSAGES
16
XP NEEDED
146
NEXT LVL
3
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary:
The image is a game-style “level up” interface screen. It shows the current level, experience progress toward the next level, and counters for messages and required XP.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

# Structured Version

## Banner
- **LEVEL UP!**

## Main Card
- **Title:** Jangan di chat nom...

### Section: LEVEL PROGRESS

- **EXPERIENCE:** 4 / 150

### Stats

- **XP NEEDED:** 146

## Footer Message

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
